name: German Chocolate Cake Using Mix
recipeInstructions:
Note: You may use 1/2 sour cream + 3/4 cup water instead of buttermilk, if desired.
Combine all cake ingredients in a large mixing bowl. Blend and beat for 4 minutes at medium speed. Pour into 3 greased and floured 9-inch layer pans. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes (or until the cake springs back when lightly pressed). Cool in the pans for 15 minutes. Remove and finish cooling on racks.
Fill and top with coconut filling. Combine frosting ingredients in a saucepan. Cook and stir over medium heat until thickened (about 12 minutes). Remove from heat; add: 1 1/3 cups chopped pecans and coconut. Cool, beating occasionally, until of spreading consistency. Makes about 2 1/2 cups. Spread between layers of cake and top. (Baker's Choc.)
